title: How can i send an E-Mail-Newsletter to people with certain Tags
excerpt: So i switched from HubSpot to Monday.com because it hase more Integration and you cant se the spf Key in Hubspot unless you buy it. Now i wan to Manage my contacts in Monday.com and I wan to be able to send the same News…

posts.author: Alex2 (b)
posts.cookedHtml:
So i switched from HubSpot to Monday.com because it hase more Integration and you cant se the spf Key in Hubspot unless you buy it. Now i wan to Manage my contacts in Monday.com and I wan to be able to send the same Newslatter to all people with the Tag customer?
pleas help
Alex

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Alex2 and thanks for bringing this to the monday.com community forums.

This sounds like a pretty interesting use case and I would be happy to see how the team at CarbonWeb might be able to help. We have done a handful of integrations with Hubspot to improve a user’s experience with both platforms. If you’d like to connect and discuss what’s possible please grab some time here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC

posts.cookedHtml: Hello! We would be happy to discuss this with you on an intro call. If you are interested, please send an email to jenna@iointegration.com. We are a Gold-level, monday.com partner!
